## Overview

{{ overview | default("[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a clear overview of the section here._]") }}

## Why this matters

{{ why_matters | default("[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Explain why this topic is important for the learner._]") }}

## In this section

{{ in_section | default("[AUTHOR GUIDE: _List the key learning points or topics covered._]") }}

## How to approach this section

_Provide guidance on how to study this material (e.g. "Watch the video first, then try the exercise")._

---
